examples: Many causes could induce rhabdomyolysis, such as exercise, thermoplegia, or autoallergic disease.
The most serious form of myopathy is called rhabdomyolysis.
Understand that rhabdomyolysis is a rare adverse event reported with all stating.
On a less potent dose, three patients got myopathy and none got rhabdomyolysis.
The percentage of reported rhabdomyolysis patients who had taken both Baycol and Lopid shifted from 63% in the months before the warning to 62% in the months afterward.
